prompt: Photorealistic portrait of a beautiful young woman walking on a wet stone path in front of a tall majestic waterfall, rainy weather. She is wearing a cute cotton dark pink flowy lenga with puffy sleeves blouse and white dupatta, holding a transparent clear umbrella. Long wavy hair, soft makeup, smiling happily while looking up. Background: lush green mountains, big waterfall cascading down rocky cliff, mist, rain droplets, wet ground reflections, wooden railing.
promptEn: Photorealistic portrait of a beautiful young woman walking on a wet stone path in front of a tall majestic waterfall, rainy weather. She is wearing a cute cotton dark pink flowy lenga with puffy sleeves blouse and white dupatta, holding a transparent clear umbrella. Long wavy hair, soft makeup, smiling happily while looking up. Background: lush green mountains, big waterfall cascading down rocky cliff, mist, rain droplets, wet ground reflections, wooden railing.
promptZh: 一位美丽年轻女子的照片级逼真肖像走在高大雄伟的瀑布前湿漉漉的石子路上，天气下着雨。她穿着一件可爱的棉质深粉色飘逸 Lehenga，搭配泡泡袖上衣和白色披肩，手里拿着一把透明雨伞。留着波浪长发，化着淡妆，抬头开心地笑着。背景：郁郁葱葱的青山，巨大的瀑布从岩石悬崖上倾泻而下，雾气缭绕，雨滴点点，地面湿润倒影，木制栏杆。
